args.content:
Activity 5: Escape Room Challenge
  - Description: Teams work together to solve puzzles and escape from a themed escape room within a time limit.
  - Objective: To improve problem-solving, communication, and teamwork under pressure.
  - Location: Downtown Escape Rooms
  - Date: 2024-01-10
  - Time: 14:00 - 16:00

Activity 6: Volunteer Day
  - Description: A day dedicated to giving back to the community through volunteering at a local charity or non-profit organization.
  - Objective: To foster teamwork, empathy, and a sense of purpose beyond work.
  - Location: Various community locations
  - Date: 2024-02-15
  - Time: 09:00 - 17:00
